purpose: FastAIBooking Amazon Connect/Lex telephony ASR benchmark
blockedReason: The Connect instance advertises S3 call recording storage, but the configured bucket was not accessible with the current AWS profile; MEDIA_STREAMS is not configured; Contact Lens real-time analysis was not found for the incident contacts. No approved 30-sample 8 kHz audio corpus is available to this repository run.

privacy.notes: Add only approved redacted audio URIs outside Git. Do not commit raw production recordings.

requiredPositivePhrases: Full Set today at 3 PM with Amy
Full Set... today at 3 PM... with Amy
Full Set today at 3 PM, any staff is fine
